languages.text: "Стоит рискнуть. Зарков требует немало ресурсов — пусть планета же и компенсирует часть затрат. Пошлите весть Каису-торр-Шайга".
"It is worth the risk. Zarkov requires many resources — let the planet compensate for some of the cost. Send word to Kais-torr-Shaiga."
languages.original_text: "Стоит рискнуть. Зарков требует немало ресурсов — пусть планета же и компенсирует часть затрат. Пошлите весть Каису-торр-Шайга".

traits.locale_text: "It is worth the risk. Zarkov requires many resources — let the planet compensate for some of the cost. Send word to Kais-torr-Shaiga."
"It is worth the risk. Zarkov requires many resources — let the planet compensate for some of the cost. Send word to Kais-torr-Shaiga."
"It is worth the risk. Zarkov requires many resources — let the planet compensate for some of the cost. Send word to Kais-torr-Shaiga."

languages.text: 「リスクを冒す価値はある。ザルコフは多くの資源を必要とする。惑星が一部の費用を補填するだろう。カイス・トル・シャイガに連絡を」
languages.original_text: "It is worth the risk. Zarkov requires many resources — let the planet compensate for some of the cost. Send word to Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: 「リスクを冒す価値はある。ザルコフは多くの資源を必要とする。惑星が一部の費用を補填するだろう。カイス・トル・シャイガに連絡を。」

languages.text: «El riesgo merece la pena. Zarkov requiere muchos recursos; que el planeta compense parte de los costes. Informe a Kais-torr-Shaiga».
languages.original_text: "It is worth the risk. Zarkov requires many resources — let the planet compensate for some of the cost. Send word to Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: «El riesgo merece la pena. Zarkov requiere muchos recursos; que el planeta compense parte de los costes. Informe a Kais-torr-Shaiga».

languages.text: “值得冒险。扎尔科夫需要大量资源——就让这颗行星承担部分成本吧。联系凯斯-托尔-夏迦。”
languages.original_text: "It is worth the risk. Zarkov requires many resources — let the planet compensate for some of the cost. Send word to Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: “值得冒险。扎尔科夫需要大量资源——就让这颗行星承担部分成本吧。联系凯斯-托尔-夏迦。”

languages.text: "Das ist das Risiko wert. Zarkov braucht viele Ressourcen ... soll der Planet für einen Teil der Kosten aufkommen. Informiert Kais-torr-Shaiga."
languages.original_text: "It is worth the risk. Zarkov requires many resources — let the planet compensate for some of the cost. Send word to Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist das Risiko wert. Zarkov braucht viele Ressourcen ... soll der Planet für einen Teil der Kosten aufkommen. Informiert Kais-torr-Shaiga."

languages.text: "Bu riske değer. Zarkov çok fazla kaynak gerektiriyor. Bırakın gezegen, maliyetin bir kısmını karşılasın. Kais-torr-Shaiga'ya haber gönderin."
languages.original_text: "It is worth the risk. Zarkov requires many resources — let the planet compensate for some of the cost. Send word to Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: "Bu riske değer. Zarkov çok fazla kaynak gerektiriyor. Bırakın gezegen, maliyetin bir kısmını karşılasın. Kais-torr-Shaiga'ya haber gönderin."

languages.text: « Le jeu en vaut la chandelle. Zarkov nécessite de grandes quantités de ressources. Faisons en sorte que la planète compense une partie de ces coûts. Faites parvenir un message à Kais-torr-Shaiga. »
languages.original_text: "It is worth the risk. Zarkov requires many resources — let the planet compensate for some of the cost. Send word to Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: « Le jeu en vaut la chandelle. Zarkov nécessite de grandes quantités de ressources. Faisons en sorte que la planète compense une partie de ces coûts. Faites parvenir un message à Kais-torr-Shaiga. »
